owns: job submission, polling, cancel, and kill semantics
workspace, session, artifact, and export contracts
transport to local or remote proof hosts
doesNotOwn: proof-host toolchain lifecycle at product scale

referenceSurfaces.packages/fwp-client: canonical upper seam package for formal-claim style callers
referenceSurfaces.apps/ide-shell: reference client and fixture harness only
referenceSurfaces.integrations/*-adapter: reference adapter implementations for protocol validation
referenceSurfaces.services/isabelle-runner: development proof-host shim, not the canonical production proof-assistant owner
